description_for_human: MCP tools for parsing RFPs, retrieving grounded answers via Foundry IQ, routing questions to SMEs via Work IQ, and compiling DOCX responses.
description_for_model: Use these tools to: 1) parse an RFP PDF into questions (parseRfp), 2) retrieve cited answers from the knowledge base (retrieveAnswer), 3) find subject-matter experts (findSme), 4) assign review tasks in Planner (assignToSme), 5) compile and upload the final DOCX response (compileResponse). Always retrieve before answering. Always cite sources.

functions.name: parseRfp
functions.description: Parse an RFP PDF from SharePoint into a structured list of questions grouped by section.

functions.name: retrieveAnswer
functions.description: Retrieve a grounded, cited answer for an RFP question from the company knowledge base using Foundry IQ semantic search. Returns confidence score — flag for SME review if below 0.6.

functions.name: findSme
functions.description: Find the best subject-matter expert for a topic using Work IQ people signals (Graph People API and recent document insights).

functions.name: assignToSme
functions.description: Create a Microsoft Planner task assigning an RFP question to a subject-matter expert for review and approval.

functions.name: compileResponse
functions.description: Compile all drafted answers into a formatted DOCX and upload to the SharePoint RFPCorpus/Responses/ library. Returns the SharePoint URL.

tools.name: parseRfp
tools.description: Parse an RFP PDF from SharePoint into a structured list of questions.

fileUrl.description: SharePoint download URL for the RFP PDF

accessToken.description: Graph access token for file download

tools.name: retrieveAnswer
tools.description: Retrieve a grounded, cited answer for an RFP question via Foundry IQ. Returns confidence score — flag for SME review if below 0.6.

tools.name: findSme
tools.description: Find the best subject-matter expert for a topic using Work IQ people signals (Graph People API and document insights).

topic.description: Topic or keyword to find an expert for

tools.name: assignToSme
tools.description: Create a Microsoft Planner task assigning an RFP question to an SME for review.

userId.description: Entra object ID of the SME

planId.description: Planner plan ID (falls back to PLANNER_PLAN_ID env var)

tools.name: compileResponse
tools.description: Compile all drafted RFP answers into a formatted DOCX and upload to SharePoint.
